edge_recon_action_superseded_ck.name: edge_recon_action_superseded_ck
edge_recon_action_superseded_ck.value: ("edge_reconciliation_log"."action" = 'SUPERSEDE' AND "edge_reconciliation_log"."superseded_edge_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("edge_reconciliation_log"."action" = 'KEEP_BOTH' AND "edge_reconciliation_log"."superseded_edge_id" IS NULL)
